# .github/workflows

GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline definitions.

## Planned Workflows

- `ci.yml` — Run linting (black, flake8, eslint), type checking, and unit tests on push/PR
- `deploy-frontend.yml` — Build and deploy frontend to Vercel/Netlify/GitHub Pages
- `deploy-backend.yml` — Build and deploy backend to Render/Railway
- `nightly.yml` — Nightly scheduled full test suite and integration tests
